description: The LocomotionPermissions component allows you to control what locomotions users can use in your world.

fields.LocomotionListMode: Whether to blacklist or whitelist the ``Locomotions``.
fields.Scaling: Whether self scale is Disallowed, Allowed, or Edit Mode Only.
fields.JumpToUser: Whether jumping to users is Disallowed, Allowed, or Edit Mode Only.

notes.title: Introduction
notes.text: The LocomotionPermissions component allows you to control what locomotions users can use in your world.
